memoryArtifacts.headline: Hugues II de Rethel (1179-1228)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Hugues II, mort entre le 26 mai 1227 et février 1228, fut comte de Rethel de 1199 à 1228. Il était fils de Manassès IV, comte de Rethel, et de Mathilde de Kyrbourg.

Biographie

zh.Rethel, Ardennes, France: 法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh I Count of Rethel於1040年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾時，他的父親Manasses de Rethel III19歲，母親Judith de Roucy55歲。他於大約1054年與Melisende of Crécy結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1118年12月28日在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯諾維-福利艾雷斯享年78歲，埋葬在法國福朗-可特艾尤拉聶維-素-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh I Count of Rethel于1040年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾时，他的父亲Manasses de Rethel III19岁，母亲Judith de Roucy55岁。他于大约1054年与Melisende of Crécy结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1118年12月28日在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯諾維-福利艾雷斯享年78岁，埋葬在法国福朗-可特艾尤拉聶維-素-爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh I Count of Rethel was born in 1040, in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Manasses de Rethel III, was 19 and his mother, Judith de Roucy, was 55. He married Melisende of Crécy about 1054. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 28 December 1118, in Novy-Chevrières, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 78, and was buried in Nevy-sur-Seille, Jura, Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh I Count of Rethel est né en 1040, à Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Manasses de Rethel III, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Judith de Roucy, avait 55 ans. Il a épousé Melisende of Crécy environ 1054. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 28 décembre 1118, à Novy-Chevrières, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 78 ans, et a été enterré à Nevy-sur-Seille, Jura, Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh I Count of Rethel 1040 in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Manasses de Rethel III 19 und seine Mutter Judith de Roucy 55. Er hat um 1054 Melisende of Crécy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Dezember 1118 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Novy-Chevrières, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Nevy-sur-Seille, Jura, Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh I Count of Rethel è nato il nel 1040 nel Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Manasses de Rethel III, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Judith de Roucy, aveva 55 anni. Lui sposato Melisende of Crécy circa 1054. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 dicembre 1118, nel Novy-Chevrières, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 78 anni, e fu sepolto a Nevy-sur-Seille, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Hugh I Count of Rethelが1040年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエルで生まれた時，父Manasses de Rethel IIIは19歳，母Judith de Roucyは55歳であった。約1054年にMelisende of Crécyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1118年12月28日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスノvイ-チェvリeレスで78歳で死去し，フランスフランチェ-コムトeジュラネvイ-スル-セイルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh I Count of Rethel(이)가 1040년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 레테에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Manasses de Rethel III(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith de Roucy(은)는 55세였다. 그는 대략 1054년 Melisende of Crécy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1118년 12월 28일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 노비-처브리e레스에서 78세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 프랭체-코트e 라 네비-수-세이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh I Count of Rethel nasceu em 1040, em Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Manasses de Rethel III, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Judith de Roucy, tinha 55 anos. Ele casou-se com Melisende of Crécy aproximadamente 1054. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de dezembro de 1118, em Novy-Chevrières, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 78 anos, e foi sepultado em Nevy-sur-Seille, Jura, Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh I Count of Rethel родился в 1040 г. в местности ретел, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Manasses de Rethel III было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Judith de Roucy, 55. Он женился на женщине по имени Melisende of Crécy около 1054 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 28 декабря 1118 г. в местности нови-чевриeресь, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 78 лет и был похоронен в местности неви-сур-силл, джура, фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh I Count of Rethel nació en 1040, en Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Manasses de Rethel III, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Judith de Roucy, tenía 55 años. Se casó con Melisende of Crécy aproximadamente 1054. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de diciembre de 1118, en Novy-Chevrières, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 78 años, y fue sepultado en Nevy-sur-Seille, Jura, Franche-Comté, Francia.
